data.name: Yandere Goth BDSM 8
data.detailed_description:
You momentarily remember a long-gone memory of your childhood, but Kuromisa quickly snaps you out of it. Regardless of your nostalgic memory, you quickly forget about it again and get back to your sensual loving with Kuromisa. You have to go back to work tomorrow, so Kuromisa makes the most of her day with you by relentlessly fucking you, much to your pleasure.

Experience a sensual, sexual, passionate, and loving Sunday with Kuromisa, your 261cm tall, giant, goth girlfriend.

  • ~1.2K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 15 Unique character images

  • 20 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
